---
name: Add lightweight telemetry (opt-in)
about: Add optional analytics while respecting privacy
title: Add lightweight telemetry (opt-in)
labels: ["enhancement", "analytics"]
assignees: []
---

Add optional, opt-in analytics to measure demo usage (e.g., how often wallets are generated). Ensure opt-in and anonymized events.

Acceptance criteria:
- Add an opt-in toggle
- Record minimal anonymized events only if user opts in
- Document privacy implications
